title: Youtube Poop: You're Supposed to Be Dead!
description:
A Final Fantasy Poop?! No way!

Yes, it took me a while, but I finally managed to put together Youtube's 1st Final Fantasy Poop.  I can tell you right now, it wasn't easy.  It took a long time to think of things to do, but I feel it's really paid off.  Enjoy! :)
